message:
chore(beads): update issue gjgc status to in_progress

Marks the @xenova/transformers bundler fix issue as in_progress to
reflect that work has begun on the dynamic Function-based import
solution (committed separately).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gc1","title":"Create Zod schema validation (prompts/schema.ts)","description":"Part 3.2 of PLAN. Zod schema for Prompt type validation. PromptSchema validates: id (kebab-case, non-empty), title, description, category (enum), tags (array), author, version (semver), content (non-empty), optional fields (whenToUse, tips, variables, changelog). promptArraySchema validates entire registry. Used by validate-prompts.ts script and at build time.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:46:58.405649667-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:25.614784831-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:18:25.614784831-05:00","close_reason":"Implementation complete and verified with type checking","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gc1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-x21","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:40.144978125-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","title":"Fix Next dev server failing when @xenova/transformers missing in semantic search","description":"Next dev server fails on startup with: 'Module not found: Can't resolve @xenova/transformers' from packages/core/src/search/semantic.ts (SpotlightSearch import chain). This blocks Playwright E2E runs and local dev. Fix should keep semantic search optional without requiring the dependency (e.g., computed import string, server-only dynamic import, or conditional load).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-13T14:56:33.466908336-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-13T14:56:45.722783089-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-51i6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-13T14:56:33.471902305-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","title":"Fix Next dev server failing when @xenova/transformers missing in semantic search","description":"Next dev server fails on startup with: 'Module not found: Can't resolve @xenova/transformers' from packages/core/src/search/semantic.ts (SpotlightSearch import chain). This blocks Playwright E2E runs and local dev. Fix should keep semantic search optional without requiring the dependency (e.g., computed import string, server-only dynamic import, or conditional load).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-13T14:56:33.466908336-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-13T15:19:37.49423035-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gjgc","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-51i6","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-13T14:56:33.471902305-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gn9y","title":"EPIC: Admin Dashboard & Moderation","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-lbq.

## Overview
Admin dashboard and content moderation tools for platform management.

## Access Control
- Admin role in user_profiles (is_admin boolean or role field)
- Middleware to protect /admin routes
- Admin-only API endpoints

## Admin Dashboard Features

### 1. Overview Dashboard (/admin)
- Total users (and growth chart)
- Active subscriptions (MRR)
- Content counts (prompts, packs, skills)
- Recent signups
- Recent activity

### 2. User Management (/admin/users)
- Search/filter users
- View user details
- View user's content
- Impersonate user (careful!)
- Suspend/ban user
- Adjust subscription manually

### 3. Content Moderation (/admin/moderation)
- Queue of reported content
- Review and take action (approve, remove, warn)
- View reporter info
- Appeal handling

### 4. Featured Content (/admin/featured)
- Mark prompts/packs/skills as featured
- Manage "Prompt of the Day"
- Editor's picks curation

### 5. System Settings (/admin/settings)
- Feature flags
- Maintenance mode toggle
- Global announcements

## Database
- reports (content reports from users)
- admin_actions (audit log of admin actions)
- featured_content (featured items with positions)
- Add is_admin to user_profiles
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:22:23.299330089-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:22:23.299330089-05:00"}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gr6a","title":"Fix PromptDetailModal showing stray 0 when only one section exists","description":"React renders numeric 0 for length checks; use explicit >0 checks for whenToUse/tips blocks","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:50:42.836780206-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:51:23.934751357-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T17:51:23.934751357-05:00","close_reason":"Use explicit >0 length checks to avoid rendering 0 in JSX"}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gtb","title":"Implement semantic rerank (search/semantic.ts) -- Details: semanticRerank(query, candidates, opts) reranks BM25 results. Lazy-loads @xenova/transformers MiniLM. Model cached in $HOME/.config/jfp/models. Falls back to hash embeddings on error/timeout. One-time download message.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:45.006385437-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:32:43.843637986-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:32:43.843637986-05:00","close_reason":"Already implemented in semantic.ts: semanticRerank() lazy-loads MiniLM, falls back to hashEmbedding. semanticRerankHash() for sync operation. Tested and working - correctly reranks by semantic relevance.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gtb","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-m5k","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:22.93861772-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-gtb","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ear","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:22.964201174-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
